Climate tipping points

Lame-duck periods is the best connection because it exposes the gap between formal office and actual influence; the ending has arrived socially before it arrives legally. Both ideas ask alpacas to notice that A transition system survives only if temporary authority knows it is temporary. Restraint is the source of legitimacy.
